facts.date: Monday after Vasaloppet (first Monday in March)

distance_km.note: Multiple sources confirm 90 km for Öppet Spår Sunday, matching the classic Vasaloppet distance.[1][3]

elevation_m.note: No reliable sources found specifying total elevation gain for Öppet Spår; Vasaloppet track profile shows partial data but not total.[4]

discipline.note: Sources describe it as the 'entire classic Vasaloppet' but no explicit confirmation of classic-only technique for Öppet Spår Sunday; related Monday 45 is freestyle.[1][2]

field_size.note: No specific participant numbers found for Öppet Spår Sunday; Vasaloppet main event has ~15,000 but Öppet Spår not detailed.[3][4]

founded.note: No sources confirm founding year for Öppet Spår specifically; Vasaloppet founded 1922.[4]

official_website.note: Database URL returns no direct content in results; official info on Vasaloppet sites and Visit Dalarna.[1][7]

race_date.note: Sources indicate Sunday (Öppet Spår Sunday), not Monday; e.g., 22 Feb 2026 Sunday, Vasaloppet typically first Sunday in March.[1][3]
